synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-1841 Oracle Linux 10 nbdkit bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-1841
description:
[1.44.1-4]
- Fix v2v conversion failure when minimum_io_size > 64K
  resolves: RHEL-140707

[1.44.1-3]
- vddk export parameter should allow loose wildcards without FNM_PATHNAME
  resolves: RHEL-137303
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-1841

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-1841.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

Description of changes:

[1.44.1-4]
- Fix v2v conversion failure when minimum_io_size > 64K
  resolves: RHEL-140707

[1.44.1-3]
- vddk export parameter should allow loose wildcards without FNM_PATHNAME
  resolves: RHEL-137303
